phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Quattro Canti crossroads is
phrases.cultural_note: The Quattro Canti is the Baroque crossroads at the intersection of Palermo's two main streets — the symbolic centre of the historic city.

responses.english: At the crossroads of Corso and Via Maqueda, it's here.
responses.phonetic: al-leen-KROH-choh trah eel KOR-soh eh VEE-ah mah-KEH-dah, eh kwee.
responses.french: All'incrocio tra il Corso e Via Maqueda, è qui.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to try Palermo's famous street food
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova il miglior street food di Palermo?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah eel meel-YOR street food dee pah-LER-moh?
phrases.cultural_note: Palermo's street food is among Italy's most distinctive — arancine, panelle, pane ca' meusa, and cannoli.

responses.english: At the Vucciria or at the Ballarò market.
responses.phonetic: AL-lah voot-CHEE-ryah oh al mer-KAH-toh dee bal-lah-ROH.
responses.french: Alla Vucciria o al mercato di Ballarò.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the Palermo Cathedral
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva al Duomo di Palermo?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah al DWOH-moh dee pah-LER-moh?

responses.english: Along Corso Vittorio Emanuele westward, ten minutes.
responses.phonetic: LOON-goh eel KOR-soh veet-TOH-ryoh eh-man-WEH-leh VER-soh oh-VEST, DYEH-chee mee-NOO-tee.
responses.french: Lungo il Corso Vittorio Emanuele verso ovest, dieci minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the Arab-Norman churches
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove sono le chiese arabo-normanne?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh SOH-noh leh KYEH-zeh ah-RAH-boh-nor-MAN-neh?

responses.english: The Palatine Chapel is at the Palace of the Normans, the main one.
responses.phonetic: lah kap-PEL-lah pah-lah-TEE-nah eh ah pah-LAHT-tsoh day nor-MAN-nee, preen-chee-PAH-leh.
responses.french: La Cappella Palatina è a Palazzo dei Normanni, principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes to Monreale
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale autobus va a Monreale?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh ow-toh-BOOS vah ah mon-reh-AH-leh?

responses.english: The 389, from the Central Station, every hour.
responses.phonetic: eel treh-ot-toh-NOH-veh, DAL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh chen-TRAH-leh, ON-nyee OH-rah.
responses.french: Il 389, dalla stazione Centrale, ogni ora.
